summary: The provided bank statement reveals critical signs of fund manipulation, including aggressive smurfing in August 2025 and March 2026, alongside insufficient balances and pending income verification documents.

anomalies.explanation: Five separate transfer deposits (four at 30,000 INR and one at 20,000 INR) were made on a single day (03-03-2026). This extreme clustering of identical amounts is a clear indicator of smurfing or structuring to artificially inflate the balance while evading large-transaction scrutiny.
Multiple rapid deposits of 25,000 to 30,000 INR occurred almost daily between 17-08-2025 and 23-08-2025. This highly unnatural sequence represents organized fund parking or structuring.

A massive cluster of unexplained deposits totaling 200,000 INR occurred between 28-10-2025 and 30-10-2025, including a 100,000 INR unlabeled deposit. This indicates sudden fund manipulation just before a potential statement boundary.

The current documented closing balance is 141,083.88, which is below the ¥2,000,000 threshold. Please upload statements for any additional bank accounts so balances can be aggregated to meet the requirement.
Document not provided — required for complete audit. Cannot perform cross-document income verification or assess capacity to cover costs until payslips and sponsor letters are uploaded.

full_finding.summary: The provided bank statement reveals critical signs of fund manipulation, including aggressive smurfing in August 2025 and March 2026, alongside insufficient balances and pending income verification documents.
